description: Open toed flats with dull copper sequin detailing on the straps, has a forefoot strap, a toe separator and a buckled ankle loop Beige footbed with printed branding at the heel TPU outsole with branded grooves on the forefoot and a floral lug at the heel15 days warranty for sole debonding only; no warranty on studs, sequins or other accessories (warranty not valid on products under discount or promotional offer)
